summary: Completed security update testing for QuoteMaster Pro. All 20 backend security tests passed. Frontend Email/WhatsApp sharing features working correctly - PDF downloads first, then opens sharing app.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement

passed_tests: Security Headers - X-Frame-Options = DENY
Security Headers - X-Content-Type-Options = nosniff
Security Headers - X-XSS-Protection = 1; mode=block
Security Headers - Referrer-Policy present
Security Headers - Cache-Control prevents caching
Input Sanitization - XSS in product name escaped (script tags → <script>)
Input Sanitization - XSS in product description sanitized (onerror removed)
Input Sanitization - XSS in customer name sanitized
Login - Successful with valid credentials
Login - Fails with wrong password (401)
Login - Fails with non-existent user (401)
Product Validation - Name over 200 chars rejected (422)
Product Validation - Negative price rejected (422)
Product Validation - Price over limit rejected (422)
Product Validation - Valid product created successfully
Customer Validation - Phone too short rejected (422)
Customer Validation - Tax number too long rejected (422)
Customer Validation - Valid customer created successfully
Rate Limiting - Single request not blocked
Rate Limiting - Middleware active without blocking normal requests
UI - WhatsApp share button present and clickable
UI - Email share button present and clickable
UI - PDF download button present and clickable
UI - WhatsApp share downloads PDF first then opens WhatsApp
UI - Email share downloads PDF first then opens mailto
UI - PDF download generates correct filename (Teklif_TKL-2026-0001.pdf)
critical_code_review_comments: Security implementation is comprehensive and well-structured
Input sanitization uses html.escape() and regex pattern matching for XSS protection
Rate limiting (60 req/min) and brute force protection (5 attempts, 15min block) implemented correctly
Minor: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users with prefix 'test_xss_', 'test_login_', 'test_prod_', 'test_cust_' for security tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security features fully tested: Rate limiting (60/min), brute force protection (5 attempts/15min block), XSS sanitization (html.escape + regex), secure headers (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Cache-Control). Email/WhatsApp sharing simplified - downloads PDF first, then opens sharing app.
mocked_api_note: Email sending (RESEND_API_KEY) and Iyzico subscription are MOCKED

security_features_verified.rate_limiting: 60 requests per minute limit - verified middleware active
security_features_verified.brute_force_protection: 5 failed login attempts triggers 15 minute IP block
security_features_verified.input_sanitization: XSS payloads (script tags, onerror events) are escaped/removed
